user.title: Yorkshire Water
user.description: Beta development setup: paste either a temporary Yorkshire Water access token, the full token response JSON from DevTools, or experimental OAuth authorization-code details. Optional account and meter references can be supplied if known. Tokens, authorization codes, and code verifiers contain secrets; do not share them.

data.oauth_request_offline_access: Experimental: request offline access / refresh token

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Yorkshire Water
reauth_confirm.description: Paste a fresh temporary Yorkshire Water access token, full token response JSON, or experimental OAuth authorization-code details.

data.oauth_request_offline_access: Experimental: request offline access / refresh token

error.invalid_token_response: Enter a valid token response JSON object
error.invalid_oauth: Enter valid experimental OAuth callback/code details
error.offline_access_not_supported: Yorkshire Water rejected the experimental offline access scope
error.id_token_supplied: This looks like an ID token. Paste the access_token value instead.
error.token_expired: The supplied token response is already expired

abort.already_configured: This Yorkshire Water account or meter is already configured

init.title: Yorkshire Water Auth Options
init.description: Current safe auth status: {auth_status}. Choose how to update or test authentication.

token_json.title: Update Token Response JSON
token_json.description: Paste a fresh full token response JSON from DevTools. Token values are stored only in the config entry and are redacted from logs.

raw_token.title: Update Raw Access Token
raw_token.description: Paste a fresh temporary access token.

oauth.title: Experimental OAuth/PKCE Test
oauth.description: Paste the callback URL or authorization code plus the matching PKCE code verifier. The offline access option is experimental and disabled by default.

data.oauth_request_offline_access: Experimental: request offline access / refresh token

error.invalid_token_response: Enter a valid token response JSON object
error.invalid_oauth: Enter valid experimental OAuth callback/code details
error.offline_access_not_supported: Yorkshire Water rejected the experimental offline access scope
error.id_token_supplied: This looks like an ID token. Paste the access_token value instead.
error.token_expired: The supplied token response is already expired
